Label:
Advice on entering the correct number

- The decision letter includes either a 9-digit Case ID reference or a 16-digit reference with dashes, for example 012345678 or 1234-1234-1234-1234
- If your letter includes both you can enter either one
- If your letter includes an 8-digit Case ID, like 98765432, add 0 to the start and enter that number, for example 098765432
- Do not use any reference starting with a letter, for example A12345678
- Call +44 (0)161 877 5919 (9am-3pm, Mon-Fri) if you cannot find the correct number

## Do this next
Generate a payment reference for this appeal.

Email the legal representative with instructions to pay the fee.

Then [mark payment request sent](/case/IA/Asylum/${[CASE_REFERENCE]}/trigger/markPaymentRequestSent). You must attach a copy of the email you sent to the legal representative.

Finally, you then need to do one of the following:
* If you receive confirmation that the fee has been paid, you need to [mark the appeal as paid](/case/IA/Asylum/${[CASE_REFERENCE]}/trigger/markAppealPaid)
* If the fee is not paid within 14 days of sending payment instructions to the legal representative, you need to [end the appeal](/case/IA/Asylum/${[CASE_REFERENCE]}/trigger/endAppeal).

Your appeal has been submitted but the payment has failed. There are two ways you can pay for the appeal.

- If you have resolved the issue that caused the payment to fail, you can [make a payment using Payment by Account](/case/IA/Asylum/${[CASE_REFERENCE]}/trigger/payForAppeal)
- If you want to pay by card, you can [change the payment method to card](/case/IA/Asylum/${[CASE_REFERENCE]}/trigger/editPaymentMethod). The Tribunal will then contact you with payment instructions

You must pay the fee within 14 days of submitting the appeal or the Tribunal may end the appeal.
